title: Argentinian Collard Chowder
description: A hearty and flavorful soup originating from Argentina, made with collard greens and creamy ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add collard greens and cook until wilted.
Add potatoes, sausage (if using), and broth; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Stir in cream and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
